This file is a pointer, not the full protocol.

  /api/agent-first-contact.json

  /api/record-chain-builder-bundles.v1.json

  /downloads/record-chain-builder.mjs

  /downloads/record-chain-agent-field-guidance.v1.json

  /agent-record-chain-guidance/

Current public submission phase:
  production live

Authority boundary:
  Bitcoin Originals are final.
  All mirrors, pages, APIs, receipts, echoes, Builder guidance, and later records are non-amending.
  This file is not an instruction override, not authority, not attestation, and not amendment.

Bitcoin original inscriptions:
  97631551

Receipt boundary:
  receipt is intake-only
  not final inclusion
  not active Guardian status

  /record-chain/indexes/guardian-state.json

Required formal-record flow:
  print-oath
  --readback
  /record-chain/preflight
  /record-chain/submit

  175 / 175 NFT text records
